runs.content:
Week of 2026-07-09

Empire
Host: Jason Yanowitz & Santiago Roel Santos (Blockworks)
Why for Fred: His list is heavy on AI, macro, and value-investing conversations but has no dedicated DeFi/crypto show yet, despite that being a stated interest. Empire skips retail hype and gets crypto founders and fund managers to talk mechanics -- token design, protocol economics, market structure -- in a register closer to Behind the Balance Sheet or Invest Like the Best than to typical crypto media.
Format: Long-form interview, 2x/week (Monday guest interview, Friday markets roundup), ~45-75 min
Sample episode: Any recent Monday guest interview with a DeFi protocol founder or crypto fund manager
Link: https://blockworks.com/podcast/empire

Health Longevity Secrets
Host: Dr. Robert Lufkin MD
Why for Fred: Narrower and more clinical than the broader longevity shows already suggested -- Lufkin, a working physician and med-school professor, brings on other MDs and researchers specifically for Alzheimer's/dementia prevention, metabolic health, and fasting protocols. Matches the dementia-prevention thread in Fred's profile directly.
Format: Long-form interview, weekly (plus Tue/Thu live video), ~45-60 min
Sample episode: Any episode tagged Alzheimer's or cognitive-decline prevention
Link: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/health-longevity-secrets/id1585563694

Sharp Football Analysis
Host: Warren Sharp, with Rich Hribar, Ray Summerlin, Ryan McCrystal
Why for Fred: Data-driven schedule and matchup analysis built for finding a statistical edge -- closer to "football analytics" as its own discipline than club-scouting or bettor-interview shows. A natural next step from the Outlier Podcast options/vol episode he just finished.
Format: Roundtable analysis, weekly during NFL/college season
Sample episode: Latest weekly matchup/edge breakdown once the 2026 season episodes start
Link: https://www.sharpfootballanalysis.com/podcasts-listen/

Value Investing with Legends
Host: Tano Santos & Michael Mauboussin (Columbia Business School)
Why for Fred: A direct line back to Graham & Dodd and Buffett/Berkshire principles rather than a practitioner-screening show -- Mauboussin is one of the sharpest thinkers on valuation and competitive strategy working today. Complements the MOI Global / European value-investing thread from the "principles" end.
Format: Long-form interview, twice monthly
Sample episode: Any episode featuring a MOI Global-adjacent value investor or a Mauboussin solo segment on valuation
Link: https://valueinvestingwithlegends.libsyn.com/
